name: histoda-db-ingest
description: Self-contained ingestion scripts and database daemon setup for Histoda

scripts.ingest:all: tsx -e "import('./src/ingest-climate.js'); import('./src/ingest-earthquakes.js'); import('./src/ingest-conflicts.js')" || tsx src/ingest-climate.ts && tsx src/ingest-earthquakes.ts && tsx src/ingest-conflicts.ts
